phases.label: Phase 1
phases.title: Discovery, Architecture & UX Planning
phases.summary: Kickoff, current-site audit, site structure, UX wireframes, staging setup, plugin shortlist, and migration plan.

phases.label: Phase 2
phases.title: Visual Design & Design Approval
phases.summary: Homepage concept, page templates, visual system, shopping flow screens, one revision round, and design approval.

phases.label: Phase 3
phases.title: Development, QA & Go-Live
phases.summary: Build, integrations, migration, QA, pre-launch review, DNS cutover, and go-live.

phases.label: Phase 4
phases.title: Post-Launch & Optimization
phases.summary: Post-launch monitoring, warranty fixes, GA4 checks, training, handoff, and final sign-off.

accessRequests.title: Provide Google Analytics access
accessRequests.description: Add New Minds Group to the existing GA4 property so we can review current tracking, confirm Enhanced eCommerce events, and plan the migration.

accessRequests.title: Provide Google Tag Manager access if managed separately
accessRequests.description: If Google Tag Manager is managed outside the GA4 account, add New Minds Group to the current GTM container used on rockcreteusa.com.

accessRequests.title: Provide Hotjar access
accessRequests.description: Add New Minds Group to the existing Hotjar account so we can confirm the current setup and decide what should carry over to the rebuild.

tasks.title: Run kickoff and capture decisions
tasks.description: Lead the kickoff, confirm how we will work together, capture decisions, and publish the recap.

tasks.title: Send access request email
tasks.description: Ask Hank for Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager if separate, and Hotjar access after kickoff.

tasks.title: Capture competitor and reference-site notes
tasks.description: Ask Hank which competitors he sees as strongest and what he wants to match or beat.

tasks.title: Create UX wireframes for core shopping pages
tasks.description: Wireframe homepage, category, product, cart, checkout, and account flows before visual design.

tasks.title: Define sitemap and navigation flows
tasks.description: Turn the current-site audit and product structure into the new site map and navigation plan.

tasks.title: Audit current WordPress, WooCommerce, plugins, SEO, and performance
tasks.description: Review the current setup and document what should be carried over, rebuilt, retired, or replaced.

tasks.title: Set up staging and baseline WooCommerce install
tasks.description: Create the working staging environment with WordPress, WooCommerce, Elementor Pro, and the base stack.

tasks.title: Prepare migration plan for products, customers, orders, pages, and images
tasks.description: Map the 600+ products, 1,246 customers, 7,975 orders, and content assets into the migration plan.

tasks.title: Provide analytics and Hotjar access
tasks.description: Grant access to GA4, GTM if separate, and Hotjar so the team can inspect current tracking.

tasks.title: Confirm what content stays, changes, or goes away
tasks.description: Identify must-keep pages, outdated pages, discontinued products, and any content that needs special handling.

tasks.title: Complete Phase 1 sign-off meeting
tasks.description: Review the Phase 1 outputs and confirm the project can move into visual design.

tasks.title: Design homepage concept
tasks.description: Create the homepage concept for desktop and mobile presentation.

tasks.title: Design core page templates
tasks.description: Design category, product, content, cart, checkout, order confirmation, and account templates.

tasks.title: Review designs and provide consolidated feedback
tasks.description: Review the design presentation and provide one consolidated round of feedback.

tasks.title: Complete Design Approval Meeting
tasks.description: Record approval in the July 7 face-to-face meeting before development starts.

tasks.title: Build approved WordPress and WooCommerce templates
tasks.description: Build the approved page templates, shopping pages, header, footer, and responsive behavior.

tasks.title: Configure core integrations
tasks.description: Configure Stripe, PayPal, Avalara, shipping, GA4 Enhanced eCommerce, and Hotjar carry-over decisions.

tasks.title: Run product, customer, order, and content migration
tasks.description: Migrate active and discontinued products, customers, orders, pages, images, redirects, and validation records.

tasks.title: Complete QA and pre-launch checks
tasks.description: Validate checkout, subscriptions, search, forms, migration records, responsive behavior, analytics, and launch readiness.

tasks.title: Attend Pre-Launch Review and give go/no-go
tasks.description: Review staging, QA report, migration validation, and DNS cutover plan in the September 22 meeting.

tasks.title: Coordinate go-live and Phase 3 sign-off
tasks.description: Coordinate launch, confirm DNS cutover, run smoke tests, and record Phase 3 sign-off.

tasks.title: Monitor launch and resolve warranty issues
tasks.description: Watch analytics, checkout, site health, forms, search, and critical errors during the post-launch window.

tasks.title: Run training and knowledge transfer
tasks.description: Train Hank on the new site, document recurring tasks, and answer handoff questions.

tasks.title: Attend final sign-off and handoff
tasks.description: Review final handoff materials and close the project in the October 26 meeting.
